title: Helpers at every scale
summary: How public-health helpers — nurses, scientists, parents, neighbors — work together to keep communities steady. Trauma-informed register per ADR-016 SAMHSA TIP 57: community helpers + caring framing, NEVER warfare / panic / crisis. Kit ships as draftAwaitingReview placeholder until external reviewer signoff lands; consumer code filters via QuestionKitService.loadAllPhase3Kits().
